name: LAF High Memory Software Definitions Pack
description: Durable, retrieve-first definitions that LocalAIFactory should load into context before it reasons about or builds software. Covers the software reasoning engine, code graph, graph retrieval, safe model-assisted reasoning, code building blocks, generator templates, experience memory, the safe agent runner, the model router, deterministic validation gates, the production-readiness ladder, the ERP document lifecycle, authentication hardening, migration safety, Playwright proof, fresh-clone proof, fallback-first design, and model-is-not-the-authority design. Each item is a crisp definition with why it matters and an honest boundary expressed as an implementation, test and generator implication. All items are original summaries; no third-party text is reproduced.
license: Original professional summaries of durable software-engineering definitions authored for LocalAIFactory. Free to deploy and modify within the application. No vendor documentation or other third-party copyrighted material is reproduced verbatim. Definitions are framed with confidence levels and honest boundaries; no certification or guarantee is asserted.
